name: Robot Vacuums
description: Keep your floors spotless with the best robot vacuums of 2026. From budget cleaners to AI-powered mops.
longDescription: We ran 15 robot vacuums through identical obstacle courses, carpet deep-clean tests, and mopping trials. Our rankings reflect real-world cleaning performance, navigation intelligence, and maintenance convenience.
buyingGuideIntro: Choosing the right robot vacuum depends on your needs and budget. Our testing evaluates every product across key performance criteria.
testingCriteria: Cleaning Performance — Carpet deep-clean, hardwood pickup, and edge cleaning tests
Navigation — Obstacle avoidance, room mapping accuracy, and no-go zone effectiveness
Mopping — Scrubbing effectiveness, water tank capacity, and pad auto-lifting
App & Smart Features — Setup ease, scheduling, map editing, and voice assistant integration
Maintenance — Dust bin capacity, filter replacement cost, and brush tangling resistance

seoMeta.t: 10 Best Robot Vacuums of 2026 — Expert Reviews & Rankings | TrueTopReviews
seoMeta.d: We tested 15 robot vacuums to find the 10 best. Compare cleaning power, navigation, and pricing.
